prompts.lessonTitle: The Kerygma — The First Proclamation of the Gospel
prompts.title: Responding to the Kerygma
prompts.prompt: In your own words, what part of the Kerygma most speaks to you right now? How would you explain the Gospel to someone who has never heard it?

prompts.lessonTitle: The Order of Christian Initiation of Adults (OCIA) and the Catechumenate
prompts.title: Why OCIA Matters
prompts.prompt: What do you hope to receive from the OCIA process, and what do you think it means to enter formation with a community rather than alone?
